home.heroSubtitle: JEEP JURIS is your intelligent legal assistant, specialized in Cameroonian law. Ask your questions, understand your rights.
home.domainsSubtitle: Explore the main areas of Cameroonian law
home.step1Desc: Select the legal domain that matches your question.
home.step2Desc: Describe your situation in plain language, no jargon needed.
home.step3Desc: Receive a structured response with relevant laws, analysis and recommended actions.

domains.labourDesc: Contracts, dismissal, wages, leave and employer-employee relations.
domains.criminalDesc: Offences, penalties, criminal procedure and defence rights.
domains.civilDesc: Contracts, obligations, liability and disputes between individuals.
domains.familyDesc: Marriage, divorce, parentage, inheritance and parental authority.
domains.landDesc: Property, land title, leases and land disputes.
domains.proceduresDesc: Administrative and judicial procedures, forms and deadlines.

agent.title: Legal agent
agent.disclaimer: This tool provides general legal information. It does not replace consulting a lawyer.
agent.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
agent.errorMissingKey: The AI service is not configured. Please add your GEMINI_API_KEY.
agent.emptyState: Ask your first question to get started.

library.title: Law Library
library.subtitle: Browse the main texts of Cameroonian law.

about.title: About JEEP JURIS
about.missionText: JEEP JURIS makes Cameroonian law accessible to all citizens through artificial intelligence. Our goal: democratize legal information in plain language.
about.disclaimerText: Information provided by JEEP JURIS is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute professional legal advice and is in no way a substitute for consulting a licensed lawyer in Cameroon. For any personal matter, consult a legal professional.

auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

auth.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.

footer.disclaimer: JEEP JURIS provides general legal information for educational purposes. This service is not a substitute for advice from a licensed lawyer.
